business_angle: JT Plumbing: heating and plumbing with fair pricing
distinctive_phrases: Josh was honest, prompt and very well priced
If you want a plumber that actually turns up, does a good job and reasonably priced, then Josh is the man
Josh is worth his weight in gold
I contacted him, he replied instantly and kindly came to have a look the very next morning
I can’t recommend Josh highly enough

strongest_review_quote.text:
Highly recommend, Josh gave our heating system a complete overhaul replacing all our radiators, flushing out the system (which was in a right state) and fitting a Hive system thermostat.

Josh was honest, prompt and very well priced! Which I think is rare nowadays, he could have let us spend much more money on a combi boiler which just wouldn’t have been suitable for our property, but gave us his honest opinion and saved £££’s pounds.
